title: Rights of Sentience Party
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rights of Sentience Party''' was a political party of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They maintained that, in [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that had been colonized by other [[Species/Legends|species]], native sentient species deserved [[Anti-speciesism|equal say]] in planetary affairs as the [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]]; and if the native sentient species were the majority, then they should have full control of planetary affairs.

It presumably grew out of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic's]] [[Rights of Sentience League]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
